title: Social-awkwardness app idea
html: Stub. Aug 13 2025 — Yahir captured a tweet from Simone Canciello proposing a mobile app to fix self-esteem / rewire brain / coach IRL conversation for introverts ("$30k/mo idea"), paired with TikTok keyword volumes (200K–304K/keyword). Filed alongside candidates.
